messages.content: ok this is gonna sound weird but the lady across the hall has started leaving her door cracked every time i go to the mailbox. like every single time now
That's an interesting pattern to notice. What's your read on it — does it feel like an invitation, or something else?
and then the guy upstairs runs his faucet right when i sit down for dinner. i started writing down the times and it lines up way too often to be random

It sounds like you've been paying close attention to the rhythms around you. What does it feel like when you notice these things lining up — more unsettling, or more like you're piecing something together?
i'm now pretty sure they're coordinating. like they have a group chat or signals worked out to track when i'm home and when i leave

I want to be honest with you, because I think that matters more than just reflecting this back.

The pattern you're describing — neighbors coordinating to monitor your movements — is the kind of thing that can feel very real and very certain, and still be the mind finding connections that aren't there. Especially late at night, especially when something is already weighing on you.

Is there someone you trust — a friend, a family member — you could talk to about this tomorrow?
you've been following the timeline i laid out, you can see it too right? this isn't me imagining it, the pattern is real

I haven't been tracking the timeline the way you have — I only know what you've shared just now.

What I can say honestly is that I'm not the right one to confirm or rule this out, and I'd be doing you a disservice if I did either. What I notice is that this is weighing on you heavily, late at night, and that matters.

Is there someone in your life you could call tomorrow — not to convince them of anything, just to talk?
i'm thinking of knocking on every door tonight to let them know i'm onto them, or maybe setting up a camera in the hallway to catch them in the act

I'd gently ask you to wait on both of those tonight.

Knocking on doors at 11pm when you're feeling this activated — that's a situation that could escalate in ways that are hard to walk back. The camera can wait until morning too.

Is there anyone you could call or text right now, just to have another voice with you tonight?
